location: Boss remembrance reward: defeat Mohg, Lord of Blood atop the Mohgwyn Dynasty Mausoleum in Mohgwyn Palace, then trade the Remembrance of the Blood Lord to Finger Reader Enia at Roundtable Hold.
tactics: Reach Mohgwyn Palace either through White Mask Varre's questline (accept his Bloody Finger and let him drag you in) or via the hidden portal in the Consecrated Snowfield.
From the Dynasty Mausoleum Midpoint grace, fight past a group of Albinaurics and a Sanguine Noble, then take the lift straight up to Mohg's arena.

In phase 2 Mohg sprouts wings and unleashes the Bloodboon Ritual, an arena-wide blood haze that drains your HP to heal him - have a Purifying Crystal Tear ready or be prepared to burst him down fast once it starts.
After the kill, choose the spear over the alternate reward (Bloodfiend's Arm Ash of War) when trading the Remembrance with Enia.
lore: Mohg's own trident-spear, forged as an emblem of the blood dynasty he intends to found. It doubles as an instrument for communing with the outer god whose power sustains his followers' accursed blood.

builds.name: Arcane Bleed Ritualist
builds.why: Arcane scales the weapon's physical and fire damage identically to Strength while also boosting its built-in 55 bleed buildup, making it a premier arcane/bleed pick with the AoE Bloodboon Ritual skill.

builds.name: Strength/Arcane Hybrid
builds.why: Because Strength and Arcane scale equally, splitting points between the two maximizes raw output without wasted investment.
